message:
fix(mux,codec): fix pixel overflow, zoomed pane leak, drain race, and allocation bomb

Four bugs found via systematic audit:

1. mux/tab.rs: resize_split_by used unchecked multiplication for
   pixel dimensions while all other sites use saturating_mul. Fix:
   cols.saturating_mul(dims.pixel_width).

2. mux/tab.rs: apply_layout cleared collapsed_panes but not zoomed
   state. A zoomed pane became orphaned when swapping layouts,
   causing rendering inconsistencies. Fix: set self.zoomed = None.

3. mux/tab.rs: collect_all_panes used drain() on pane_stacks, leaving
   the map empty between drain and reassignment. Any concurrent access
   (async stack cycling) would see empty stacks. Fix: use
   std::mem::take for atomic swap.

4. codec/lib.rs: decode_raw and decode_raw_async allocated vec![0u8;
   data_len] without upper bound. A malformed length field could
   trigger multi-GB allocation and OOM. Fix: add MAX_PDU_SIZE (256MB)
   check before allocation.

Validated: 301 mux tests pass, 129 codec tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
